description: CompositionTwo tone grey skirt made of 64% polyester, 34% viscose, 2% Lycra, size adjusting buttoned tabs on back, centre back opening with zipper and hook and eye fastening, centre back seam ending in slit at hemFitSlimWash careMachine wash in cold waterWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleach,Line dry in shadeWarm ironThis arrow skirt is a classic formal option for the working woman who wants to keep hold of her femininity at work. Style it with with a crisp white shirt, to show the world you mean business. Try accessorising your outfit with a pretty silk scarf in place of a tie to softly frame your face.Model statisticsThe product is a size 28 on a model of height 5'8" and waist 26"
